lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਪਤੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gupatee baanee paragatt hoe |
lines.english: The hidden Bani of the Word is revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪਰਖਿ ਲਏ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੫੩॥
lines.translit: naanak parakh le sach soe |53|
lines.english: O Nanak, the True Lord is revealed and known. ||53||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਭਾਇ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj bhaae mileeai sukh hovai |
lines.english: Meeting with the Lord through intuition and love, peace is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤੇ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: kahate mukat sabad nisataarai |
lines.english: Chanting the Shabad, he is liberated, and saves others as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਗੈ ਨੀਦ ਨ ਸੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jaagai need na sovai |
lines.english: The Gurmukh remains awake and aware; he does not fall sleep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਨ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਪਰੰਪਰਿ ਧਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: sun sabad aparanpar dhaarai |
lines.english: He enshrines the unlimited, absolute Shabad deep within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਦੀਖਿਆ ਸੇ ਸਚਿ ਰਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee deekhiaa se sach raate |
lines.english: Those who practice the Guru's Teachings are attuned to the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ਮਿਲਣ ਨਹੀ ਭ੍ਰਾਤੇ ॥੫੪॥
lines.translit: naanak aap gavaae milan nahee bhraate |54|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who eradicate their self-conceit meet with the Lord; they do not remain separated by doubt. ||54||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਬੁਧਿ ਚਵਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਕਿਤੁ ਠਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kubudh chavaavai so kit tthaae |
lines.english: "Where is that place, where evil thoughts are destroyed?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਪਤਿ ਸਾਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai naahee pat saakhai |
lines.english: Without the Shabad, no one has any credit or honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਦਰਿ ਬਾਧੇ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਰਾਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: jam dar baadhe koe na raakhai |
lines.english: No one can save one who is tied up at Death's door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਤਤੁ ਨ ਬੂਝੈ ਚੋਟਾ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kiau tat na boojhai chottaa khaae |
lines.english: The mortal does not understand the essence of reality; why must he suffer in pain?"

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਪਾਵੈ ਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kiau kar boojhai paavai paar |
lines.english: "How can one obtain understanding and cross over?"

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਨ ਬੁਝੈ ਗਵਾਰੁ ॥੫੫॥
lines.translit: naanak manamukh na bujhai gavaar |55|
lines.english: O Nanak, the foolish self-willed manmukh does not understand. ||55||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਬੁਧਿ ਮਿਟੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: kubudh mittai gurasabad beechaar |
lines.english: Evil thoughts are erased, contemplating the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਚੋਟਾ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: duramat vichhurr chottaa khaae |
lines.english: His evil-mindedness separates him from the Lord, and he suffers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤੁ ਨ ਚੀਨੈ ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਜਲਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tat na cheenai manamukh jal jaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh does not understand the essence of reality, and is burnt to ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੈ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bhettai mokh duaar |
lines.english: Meeting with the True Guru, the door of liberation is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਤਰੈ ਤਾਰੇ ਭੀ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aap tarai taare bhee soe |
lines.english: crosses over, and carries others across with him as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੁ ਵਖਰੁ ਧਨੁ ਪਲੈ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: saach vakhar dhan palai hoe |
lines.english: One who possesses the merchandise, the wealth of the True Name,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨੈ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਸਭੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਿਆਨ ॥
lines.translit: maanai hukam sabhe gun giaan |
lines.english: Accepting the Hukam of the Lord's Command, he is blessed with all virtues and spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਵੈ ਮਾਨੁ ॥੫੬॥
lines.translit: naanak daragah paavai maan |56|
lines.english: O Nanak, he is honored in the Court of the Lord. ||56||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jeh dekhaa teh rahiaa samaae |
lines.english: Wherever I look, I see the Lord permeating and pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜਿ ਰਤਾ ਬੂਝੈ ਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj rataa boojhai pat hoe |
lines.english: One who intuitively understands, and is attuned to the Lord, is honored.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਰੈ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: taa kee keemat karai na koe |
lines.english: No one can estimate his worth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁ ਸਬਦ ਕਾ ਕਹਾ ਵਾਸੁ ਕਥੀਅਲੇ ਜਿਤੁ ਤਰੀਐ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: su sabad kaa kahaa vaas katheeale jit tareeai bhavajal sansaaro |
lines.english: "Where is the Shabad said to dwell? What will carry us across the terrifying world-ocean?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਰੈ ਸਚ ਭਾਇ ॥੫੭॥
lines.translit: naanak paar parai sach bhaae |57|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Love of the True Lord, one crosses over. ||57||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਸਤ ਅੰਗੁਲ ਵਾਈ ਕਹੀਐ ਤਿਸੁ ਕਹੁ ਕਵਨੁ ਅਧਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: trai sat angul vaaee kaheeai tis kahu kavan adhaaro |
lines.english: The breath, when exhaled, extends out ten finger lengths; what is the support of the breath?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਲੈ ਖੇਲੈ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bolai khelai asathir hovai kiau kar alakh lakhaae |
lines.english: Speaking and playing, how can one be stable and steady? How can the unseen be seen?"

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਪ੍ਰਣਵੈ ਅਪਣੇ ਮਨ ਸਮਝਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sun suaamee sach naanak pranavai apane man samajhaae |
lines.english: Listen, O master; Nanak prays truly. Instruct your own mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦੇ ਸਚਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੈ ਕਰਿ ਨਦਰੀ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sabade sach liv laagai kar nadaree mel milaae |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is lovingly attuned to the True Shabad. Bestowing His Glance of Grace, He unites us in His Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁ ਸਬਦ ਕਉ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਵਾਸੁ ਅਲਖੰ ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: su sabad kau nirantar vaas alakhan jeh dekhaa teh soee |
lines.english: That Shabad dwells deep within the nucleus of all beings. God is invisible; wherever I look, there I see Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦਾਨਾ ਆਪੇ ਬੀਨਾ ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥੫੮॥
lines.translit: aape daanaa aape beenaa poorai bhaag samaae |58|
lines.english: He Himself is all-knowing and all-seeing. By perfect destiny, we merge in Him. ||58||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਵਨ ਕਾ ਵਾਸਾ ਸੁੰਨ ਨਿਵਾਸਾ ਅਕਲ ਕਲਾ ਧਰ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: pavan kaa vaasaa sun nivaasaa akal kalaa dhar soee |
lines.english: The air is the dwelling place of the absolute Lord. He has no qualities; He has all qualities.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸਬਦੁ ਘਟ ਮਹਿ ਵਸੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: nadar kare sabad ghatt meh vasai vichahu bharam gavaae |
lines.english: When He bestows His Glance of Grace, the Shabad comes to abide within the heart, and doubt is eradicated from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਾਮੋੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tan man niramal niramal baanee naamo man vasaae |
lines.english: The body and mind become immaculate, through the Immaculate Word of His Bani. Let His Name be enshrined in your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਭਵਸਾਗਰੁ ਤਰੀਐ ਇਤ ਉਤ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabad guroo bhavasaagar tareeai it ut eko jaanai |
lines.english: The Shabad is the Guru, to carry you across the terrifying world-ocean. Know the One Lord alone, here and hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਹਨੁ ਵਰਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਛਾਇਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥੫੯॥
lines.translit: chihan varan nahee chhaaeaa maaeaa naanak sabad pachhaanai |59|
lines.english: He has no form or color, shadow or illusion; O Nanak, realize the Shabad. ||59||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਸਤ ਅੰਗੁਲ ਵਾਈ ਅਉਧੂ ਸੁੰਨ ਸਚੁ ਆਹਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: trai sat angul vaaee aaudhoo sun sach aahaaro |
lines.english: O reclusive hermit, the True, Absolute Lord is the support of the exhaled breath, which extends out ten finger lengths.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੋਲੈ ਤਤੁ ਬਿਰੋਲੈ ਚੀਨੈ ਅਲਖ ਅਪਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh bolai tat birolai cheenai alakh apaaro |
lines.english: The Gurmukh speaks and churns the essence of reality, and realizes the unseen, infinite Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਮੇਟੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਸਾਏ ਤਾ ਮਨਿ ਚੂਕੈ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun mettai sabad vasaae taa man chookai ahankaaro |
lines.english: Eradicating the three qualities, he enshrines the Shabad within, and then, his mind is rid of egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਣੈ ਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਗੈ ਪਿਆਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: antar baahar eko jaanai taa har naam lagai piaaro |
lines.english: Inside and out, he knows the One Lord alone; he is in love with the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਹੁ ਤੇ ਊਪਰਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥੬੦॥
lines.translit: naanak tihu te aoopar saachaa satigur sabad samaae |60|
lines.english: O Nanak, the True Lord is above these three energy channels. Through the Word, the Shabad of the True Guru, one merges with Him. ||60||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖਮਨਾ ਇੜਾ ਪਿੰਗੁਲਾ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਾ ਆਪੇ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sukhamanaa irraa pingulaa boojhai jaa aape alakh lakhaae |
lines.english: He understands the Sushmana, Ida and Pingala, when the unseen Lord reveals Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਕੀ ਮੁਦ੍ਰਾ ਕਵਨ ਅਉਧੂ ਸਿਧ ਕੀ ਕਵਨ ਕਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: giaan kee mudraa kavan aaudhoo sidh kee kavan kamaaee |
lines.english: What is the way of the spiritual teacher, and the reclusive hermit? What is the occupation of the Siddha?"

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਾ ਜੀਉ ਪਵਨੁ ਕਥੀਅਲੇ ਪਵਨੁ ਕਹਾ ਰਸੁ ਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: man kaa jeeo pavan katheeale pavan kahaa ras khaaee |
lines.english: "The air is said to be the soul of the mind. But what does the air feed on?
